escalation_policy: P1 incident if breach exceeds 30 minutes — auto-page platform team lead
notes: Price field accuracy SLA has been breached for 135 minutes. Affects all vehicle records with MSRP above $45,000.

escalation_policy: P2 alert if breach exceeds 10 minutes
notes: API performance is healthy. Issue is data quality not performance — this is why standard performance monitoring did not catch it.

escalation_policy: P1 alert if breach exceeds 5 minutes
notes: Write success rate is healthy — fields are being written successfully. They are just being written with incorrect values. This is the detection gap.

escalation_policy: Auto-create Jira ticket and notify #dealer-support if rate exceeds threshold
notes: Dealer complaint rate is 6x normal. This is what triggered the initial Jira ticket.
